meaning: souchong 正山小种(中国产上等红茶,有明显的烟熏香味)[粤语]
examples: The subtlety of Bohea Lapsang makes cheaper versions taste like burnt toast.
Do you see a future Prime Minister who shops at Paul Smith and dunks Duchy Originals into Lapsang Souchong? Opt for Hugo.
In January 2002, it set up a research group to study the origins of Lapsang Souchong tea, only to find that the Wuyishan Nature Reserve was the birthplace of this tea variety.
